name: Salmon Won Tons
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
1. Mix cream cheese, salmon, onion, and garlic together.
2. Lay out won ton wrappers, and place 1 teaspoon of the mixture in the center of each.
3. Moisten edges of each with water.
4. Fold over and pinch edges well to seal.
5. Deep fry the wontons at 375°F until golden brown.
6. Drain on absorbent paper.
7. Serve hot with a sauce.
Grace, Juneau, Alaska
Source: Alaska Seafood Cookbook
Reprinted by permission from the Alaska Seafood Marketing Institute
